## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix

## Testing

- [ ] `pytest tests/ -v` passes locally
- [ ] Added or updated tests covering this change
- [ ] If this changes a benchmark number: reported under the size-robust
      criterion (Jaccard/centroid), not just legacy recall, and used multiple
      seeds/a bootstrap CI if the method is stochastic (MD, random backend)
